G.S.R. 7S0{E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d), (e) and (f) of sub-section (2) of Section 35 and clause (c) of section 36 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Maharashtra Administrative Tnounal (Procedure) Rules, 1988, namely:- 1. (I) These ruies may be called the Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2014. (2) T.hey shall come into force on the date of their pUblication in the Official Gazette. 2. in the Maharashtra AdminiStrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1985, in rule 5, in sub-rule (3), the ioilowing proviso shall be inserted.. namely:- "Provided that the time allowed by the Registrar to rectify the defectS shall not exceed thirty days. '" r F. No. A-IIOI4/ 612011-AT] ARCHANA VA~V1A, Jt. Secy. FOOT NOTE.-The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number G.S. R. 435(E) dated 22Jld April. 1988. -- 1 of 1 --
